title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM SC (Subject Characteristics) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM SC (Subject Characteristics) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw subject characteristics data, (2) Derive USUBJID and SCSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: SCTESTCD, SCTEST, SCORRES, SCSTRESC, SCSTRESN, (4) Handle characteristic type mapping, standardized results derivation, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 508 records.
